mapper.sql: select c.coupon_id, c.dept_id, c.parent_id, c.coupon_name, c.coupon_type, c.min_amount, c.discount_value, c.total_count, c.issued_count, c.limit_per_user, c.use_type, c.time_type, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.valid_days, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from t_coupon c
mapper.update: update t_coupon set del_flag='2' where coupon_id in #{id}
update t_coupon set issued_count = issued_count + 1 where coupon_id = #{couponId} and (total_count = -1 or issued_count < total_count)
mapper.select: select ref_id from t_coupon_goods where coupon_id = #{couponId}
